iteration_1.changes: Replaced full Chinese skill with concise English version focused on two tasks with Python scripts and critical dot-preservation regex

iteration_2.changes: Added stronger directive to use exact provided scripts, added BUG WARNING section against [^a-z0-9] pattern

iteration_3.changes: Added verification checklist with expected filenames, explicit DO NOT ADD MORE STEPS comment

iteration_4.changes: Added table of expected results, stronger anti-pattern warnings

iteration_5_final.changes: Moved critical regex and rules into description field so they appear in system prompt even when model skips skill loading. Model was never loading the skill body - it saw only the description in system prompt and wrote its own code.

key_insight: The bare runtime requires models to explicitly request skill loading via <load-skill> tag. qwen3.5-122b consistently skipped this step and wrote its own code. The fix was embedding critical regex patterns and anti-patterns directly in the skill description field, which is always visible in the system prompt.
